ddls:
CREATE TABLE "displays" (
  "display_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each display model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the display model */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product line the display belongs to */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the display manufacturer */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the display model */,
  "screen_size" REAL /* Screen size in inches */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the display (e.g., 4K, Full HD) */,
  "refresh_rate" INTEGER /* Refresh rate of the display in Hz */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("display_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_displays_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_displays_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration setting */,
  "display_id" INTEGER /* ID of the display model this setting applies to */,
  "brightness" REAL /* Brightness level measured in nits */,
  "black_level" REAL /* Black level measured in cd/m² */,
  "contrast" TEXT /* Contrast ratio */,
  "white_point" INTEGER /* White point temperature in Kelvin */,
  "gamma" REAL /* Gamma value */,
  "color_temperature" TEXT /* Color temperature in Kelvin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_settings_display_id FOREIGN KEY ("display_id") REFERENCES displays ("display_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the calibration setting that was modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the setting */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES calibration_settings ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "display_id" INTEGER /* ID of the display model this metric applies to */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., response time, color accuracy) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., ms, %) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_display_id FOREIGN KEY ("display_id") REFERENCES displays ("display_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the calibration method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the calibration method */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the calibration software used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration log entry */,
  "display_id" INTEGER /* ID of the display model calibrated */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the calibration method used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the calibration */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the calibration was performed */,
  "calibration_result" TEXT /* Result of the calibration (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_logs_display_id FOREIGN KEY ("display_id") REFERENCES displays ("display_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_logs_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES calibration_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each settings history entry */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the calibration setting being archived */,
  "brightness" REAL /* Brightness level in nits */,
  "black_level" REAL /* Black level measured in cd/m² */,
  "contrast" TEXT /* Contrast ratio */,
  "white_point" INTEGER /* White point temperature in Kelvin */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the settings were recorded */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_history_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES calibration_settings ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product line (e.g., consumer, professional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each settings validation entry */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the calibration setting being validated */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the setting is valid or not */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of the validation process */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the validation */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_validation_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES calibration_settings ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_validation_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "third_party_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each third-party tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the third-party tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the third-party tool */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the tool was integrated with the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the third-party tool integrated */,
  "display_id" INTEGER /* ID of the display model integrated */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the integration was established */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_display_id FOREIGN KEY ("display_id") REFERENCES displays ("display_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES third_party_tools ("tool_id")
)
